Interview setup and livestream now carry one matching, explicit date anchor: October 26, 2026.

Replaced the 'face stayed still' template with concrete breath and shoulder-bracing behavior.

summary: Resolved all seven packet findings in chapter_17 with continuity-safe timeline unification, canon-aligned character detail corrections, stronger confession causality, and a new mid-arc setback/action sequence that restores structural friction before federal confirmation.
